### 2c. Phase X — Tool events (session)

> Query: `python3 .sdd/tools/query_events.py --phase X --include-bash`

|---|---|---|---|

| {{seq}} | `{{ts}}` | `ToolUseCompleted` | tool=Read  out={{N}}b |
| … | | | |
